settings.title: How to Use
settings.content:
Take 1 Nitrate Complex capsule and 1 Pollen Complex capsule together daily, with water after food. Do not exceed the recommended daily intake unless under the direction of your provider.

Suitable for vegetarians and vegans. Made without most allergens (milk, eggs, fish, shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soy). Gluten and gelatin free.

settings.title: Benefits
settings.content:
✓ Relieves hot flashes and night sweats

✓ Supports balanced mood and clarity

✓ Pormotes deeper, restorative sleep

✓ Supports hearth health and energy

settings.title: Ingredients
settings.content:
Nitric Oxide Support

As estrogen declines, Nitric Oxide production drops — impacting blood flow, vascular function, and blood pressure. This ingredient helps support healthy Nitric Oxide levels to promote heart health and overall vascular performance during menopause.

Purified Pollen Extract

Clinically studied for menopausal support, purified pollen extract helps relieve vasomotor symptoms such as hot flashes and night sweats, while also supporting sleep quality and mood.

Turmeric Extract

A potent botanical known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Turmeric supports joint comfort, cardiovascular health, and overall inflammatory balance during midlife transition.

settings.title: Who Is This For?
settings.content:
Berkeley Life Menopause and Heart Health Support delivers daily, non-hormonal symptom relief while supporting what many women overlook during menopause: their heart. It is the smart place to start to feel relief today for resilience tomorrow.

Especially helpful for women who aren’t ready for HRT or cannot take it. It can also complement HRT by supporting Nitric Oxide levels and healthy vascular function during this transition.

settings.text: Advanced 2-in-1 menopause and heart health support, clinically formulated for women in midlife to address symptoms today while promoting long-term heart health.

settings.banner_text: Mother’s Day Sale: Free Gift ($30 Value) with 3 Month Subscription

settings.text: We recommend 3-6 month of consistent use for results.

settings.heading: benefits
settings.content:
• Relieves hot flashes and night sweats
  • Supports balanced mood and clarity
  • Pormotes deeper, restorative sleep
  • Supports hearth health and energy
settings.ct_body:
Only a small percentage of dietary supplements are tested in gold-standard human clinical trials.

Berkeley Life® Nitric Oxide Support has been evaluated in double-blind, placebo-controlled research demonstrating its ability to increase nitric oxide bioavailability in humans.

The dietary nitrate ingredients used in our formulation are supported by a growing body of peer-reviewed clinical research validating improvements in vascular function, endothelial health, and blood pressure regulation.

The Impact of Clinical Proof
Double-blind, placebo-controlled trials (DBPCTs) are considered the gold standard in scientific research because they help ensure:

Bias elimination
Control for placebo effect
Validated efficacy
Safety and tolerability assessment

By studying the full nitrate formulation as it is consumed, Berkeley Life® ensures the product is evaluated for real-world effectiveness and safety — not just theoretical ingredient benefits.

Nitric Oxide Production
Berkeley Life® is formulated to increase nitric oxide through the dietary nitrate → nitrite → nitric oxide pathway.

Unlike L-arginine-based supplements, this pathway remains active even when endothelial nitric oxide synthase (eNOS) declines with age.

Clinical Trial Results
In a double-blind, placebo-controlled study, participants taking Berkeley Life® demonstrated significant increases in salivary nitrite and plasma nitrite compared to placebo. Test strip readings correlated with laboratory measurements, confirming improved nitric oxide bioavailability.

Vascular & Endothelial Health
Nitric oxide is essential for healthy blood vessel function. It supports vasodilation, circulation, and endothelial integrity — all of which naturally decline with age.

Clinical Trial Results
In clinical research evaluating dietary nitrate supplementation over 12 weeks, participants showed improvements in endothelial function and reductions in carotid artery stiffness, a recognized marker of cardiovascular risk. These findings support the role of nitrate-based nitric oxide in maintaining vascular flexibility and heart health.

Blood Pressure Support
Nitric oxide helps relax and widen blood vessels, supporting healthy blood pressure regulation.

Clinical Trial Results
Clinical studies of dietary nitrates have demonstrated improvements in systolic blood pressure and vascular responsiveness compared to placebo, particularly with consistent daily use over 8–12 weeks.

Energy & Oxygen Efficiency
Nitric oxide plays a critical role in oxygen delivery and mitochondrial signaling. Healthy nitric oxide levels support efficient energy production and muscle performance.

Clinical Research Findings
Research on dietary nitrates has shown improvements in oxygen utilization and exercise efficiency, including reduced oxygen cost during physical activity.

Aging & Nitric Oxide Decline
Nitric oxide production naturally declines with age due to oxidative stress, hormonal shifts, and reduced enzyme activity.

Berkeley Life® provides a nitrate-based pathway that supports nitric oxide production independently of age-related enzymatic decline, offering measurable vascular support as the body’s natural production decreases.

settings.heading: Menopause is more than just symptoms—**it's a health inflection point.**

settings.callout_items:
Hot flashes
Night Sweats
Sleep Disruption
Mood changes

settings.text: These are the visible signs of menopause. But beneath the surface, a deeper biological shift is happening. As estrogen declines, Nitric Oxide production drops, impairing blood flow and increasing long-term cardiovascular risk.

settings.heading: Menopause Symptom Relief
settings.text: Menopause can bring hot flashes, night sweats, and sleep changes that disrupt daily life. This formula helps relieve common vasomotor and mood-related symptoms to support greater comfort and balance.

settings.heading: LONG-TERM HEALTH
settings.text: At the same time, declining estrogen can reduce Nitric Oxide production, impacting blood flow and heart health. By supporting Nitric Oxide levels, it also promotes heart health during and beyond menopause.

settings.heading: Dual-Action Formula.  One Daily Habit. Whole Body Support
settings.text: Most solutions focus only on symptom relief. Berkeley Life provides effective relief while also supporting your long-term health. All in one simple, non-hormonal daily habit.

settings.description: Some women report fewer hot flashes and night sweats, improved sleep quality, and early stabilization of mood.

Continued use is associated with broader symptom relief, including reduced vaginal dryness, improved libido, fewer heart palpitations, and support for healthy blood pressure. Cognitive symptoms like brain fog may also improve.
Daily support of Nitric Oxide production helps promote vascular function, cardiovascular health, and healthy aging beyond menopause.

settings.heading: Like any supplement rooted in science—**consistent daily use is key.**
Berkeley Life **Vs. Others**
settings.description: Berkeley Life is clinically proven to promote healthy blood flow, heart health, and whole-body balance during menopause and beyond.

settings.quote: I've been taking this supplement for a week & am happy to report that my middle of the night hot flashes have been reduced to essentially nothing. In comparison to experiencing one every hour, this has greatly helped my sleep and overall well being. Very pleased with this product.
settings.name: Jeanine R.

settings.quote: I view Nitric Oxide as a keystone for women's health. When it's supported, everything from exercise recovery to cognitive sharpness to everyday energy improves. That's why I recommend Berkeley Life. It's clinically effective, easy for women to integrate, and truly makes a difference.
settings.name: Dr. Mariza Snyder
settings.age: Functional Wellness Practitioner & Women's Health Expert

settings.heading: What is Berkeley Life Menopause & Heart Health Support?
settings.content:
Berkeley Life Menopause & Heart Health Support is a two-capsule daily, non-hormonal formula designed to support women during perimenopause and postmenopause.
Each daily serving includes:

  • 1 Nitric Oxide (NO) capsule providing ~250 mg dietary nitrates
  • 1 Meno Blend capsule containing purified cytoplasmic pollen extract (PCP), turmeric, and rice bran

Together, they support:

  • Reduction of hot flashes and night sweats
  • Improved sleep quality
  • Mood balance
  • Energy and circulation
  • Preventive cardiovascular support during estrogen decline

settings.heading: Who is this product for?
settings.content:
This formula is designed for:

  • Women 40+ navigating perimenopause
  • Postmenopausal women
  • Women seeking non-hormonal support
  • Women wanting to protect heart health as estrogen declines

It may be used by women who choose not to use hormone replacement therapy (HRT), as well as those currently using HRT who want additional vascular support.

settings.heading: Why does menopause affect heart health?
settings.content:
As estrogen declines, nitric oxide production decreases.
Estrogen normally supports endothelial nitric oxide synthase (eNOS), the enzyme responsible for producing nitric oxide in blood vessels. When estrogen levels drop:

  • Nitric oxide production declines
  • Blood vessels become less flexible
  • Oxidative stress increases
  • Vascular stiffness rises

This shift contributes to the increased cardiovascular risk seen after menopause.
Supporting nitric oxide production is an important part of preventive vascular care.

settings.heading: How long does it take to work?
settings.content:
Month 1:
Many women notice fewer hot flashes and improved sleep onset.
Month 2:
Mood stability and energy may continue improving.
Month 3:
Clinical research on dietary nitrates shows measurable improvements in vascular function at 12 weeks.
Individual results vary.

settings.heading: Why is there only one Nitric Oxide capsule instead of two?
settings.content:
The menopause formula combines nitric oxide support with the pollen blend for complementary benefits.
One NO capsule provides foundational vascular support while the Meno Blend addresses vasomotor, mood, and sleep symptoms.
Women who previously used two NO capsules daily may:

  • Transition to the menopause formula alone
  • Add an additional NO capsule if needed
  • Monitor nitric oxide levels using Berkeley Life Test Strips

Consult your healthcare provider for personalized dosing.

settings.heading: Can I take this with hormone replacement therapy (HRT)?
settings.content:
Yes.
This formula is non-hormonal and may complement HRT by supporting vascular function and circulation.Always consult your prescribing provider before combining therapies.

settings.heading: Do you ship overseas?
settings.content: Yes, we ship all over the world. Shipping costs will apply, and will be added at checkout. We run discounts and promotions all year, so stay tuned for exclusive deals.

settings.heading: How long will it take to get my order?
settings.content: It depends on where you are. Orders processed here will take 5-7 business days to arrive. Overseas deliveries can take anywhere from 7-16 days. Delivery details will be provided in your confirmation email.

settings.heading: Can I return my product?
settings.content: We always aim for make sure our customers love our products, but if you do need to return an order, we’re happy to help. Just email us directly and we’ll take you through the process.

settings.heading: Can I get my product personalized?
settings.content: It depends on the creator and the product. All options are outlined on the product page, so look out for customization options there.
